title: Cobblemon World Cup
description: Battle your friends on the Cobblemon World Cup Island map!
body:
The Cobblemon World Cup Modpack for Fabric

About This Modpack:

Battle your friends on the Cobblemon World Cup Island!

The CWC Island comes pre-installed in your singleplayer worlds. Explore the island, battle in the Fire, Water, Grass, or Champion's arenas, and experience Cobblemon's NPCs as cheering crowds, referee Gholdengos, fast-travel portals, animated builds and more!

The Cobblemon World Cup modpack is designed to make your Minecraft experience immersive with improved visuals and audio while running better than vanilla Cobblemon by using many optimization mods. Included are optional extras such a recommended resource pack and shader pack, disabled by default.

Alternatively, you can download the official Cobblemon modpack on Modrinth or CurseForge! We recommend downloading the modpack with the Modrinth App, but Prism Launcher is also a good alternative launcher that can download modpacks from any of these sites.

Notice: Cobblemon does NOT have an official server. You can find a list of public servers on our website, or in the #server-listings channel in our Discord, and add them to the multiplayer menu. Alternatively, you can buy your own server from hosts such as BisectHosting.

Note: The Cobblemon mod is still in development and is being actively updated. There are many features that are work-in-progress or placeholders until things are finished. There are also some existing features that will be getting more polish as we keep moving. Many more features are planned, including but not limited to things like NPCs, riding Pokémon, breeding, and structures.

Join our Discord to follow development progress, chat with the team, ask questions, and get sneak peeks into upcoming features!

Explore the Cobblemon World Cup Island!

Battle Your Friends on the Island's 4 Arenas!

Discover Unique NPCs Around the Map!

Modpack Contents:

If you want to get any of these mods for personal use, please download them from their original pages to support their authors.

Mods:

  • Ambient Environment - Adds color noise to biome colors.
  • Better Ping Display - Displays each player's ping in the player list as a number in (ms).
  • Better Third Person - Allows independent rotation of the camera in third-person view. Permission
  • Cobblemon - Adds the Pokémon to your Minecraft.
  • CraftPresence - Displays info about the game being played on Discord.
  • Entity Culling - Skips rendering entities you can't see to improve performance.
  • Entity View Distance - Allows range extension of the distance entities are visible.
  • Falling Leaves - Adds falling leaf and snow particles.
  • FancyMenu - Customizes the main menu.
  • FerriteCore - Optimizes memory usage.
  • ImmediatelyFast - Optimizes immediate rendering.
  • InvMove - Adds the ability to walk around while in inventories.
  • Krypton - Optimizes the networking stack.
  • LambDynamicLights - Adds dynamic lights.
  • Language Reload - Improves the language selection menu.
  • Lithium - Adds many game optimizations.
  • Make Bubbles Pop - Makes bubble particles pop.
  • Particle Rain - Replaces the default weather with particle effects, better on performance than vanilla rain.
  • Particular - Enhances the ambience with particle-based visual effects.
  • Presence Footsteps - Makes footsteps sound better and more dynamic.
  • Reese's Sodium Options - Improves Sodium's options menu.
  • Satin Free Wakes - Adds wakes that trail behind things moving across water, updated version of Wakes.
  • Sodium - Optimizes rendering.
  • Sodium Extra - Provides more options in the video settings.
  • Sodium Extras - Adds features to Sodium to improve the experience and performance.
  • Sodium Leaf Culling - Improves the performance of leaf rendering.
  • Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks - Smooths shading on path blocks with Sodium.
  • ToolTipFix - Fixes tooltips runnning off-screen.
  • Visuality - Adds various particle effects to blocks and entities.
  • Your Options Shall Be Respected (YOSBR) - Prevents configs from being overwritten by updates.

    • Dependencies:

  • BisectHosting Server Integration Menu - Required by our hosting partner.
  • Cloth Config API - Required by many mods to use their in-game config menus.
  • Fabric API - Required by all Fabric mods.
  • Iris Shaders - Required by all shader packs.
  • Konkrete - Required by FancyMenu.
  • Melody - Required by FancyMenu.
  • Mod Menu - Allows in-game configuration of Fabric mods.
  • oωo-lib - Required by Particular.
  • Sodium Options API - Required by Sodium Leaf Culling, and Sodium Extras.
  • UniLib - Required by CraftPresence.
  • YetAnotherConfigLib - Required by Satin Free Wakes.

    • Resourcepacks:

  • Motschen's Better Leaves (not enabled by default) - Resource pack to make leaves look bushier.

    • Shaderpacks:

  • Complementary Shaders - Reimagined (not enabled by default) - Recommended shader pack.

    • Cobblemon is not affiliated with Pokémon nor Minecraft.

    Minecraft is a trademark of Mojang Synergies AB ｜ Pokémon is a trademark of Nintendo, Creatures Inc. and GAME FREAK inc.
